name: Word
short_description: Type the Bible and record your best WPM for each verse!
detailed_description:
Type any verse in the Bible and record your best WPM for each verse-set (1 - 2 verses per set).

Key Features:

  • Type the entire Bible in any order you like.
Word is a non-linear typing game in which you can type any book, chapter or verse in the Bible.

  • Record your highest WPM for each verse-set.
Each menu and button show your progress and best WPM.
Replay levels to improve your stats!
Think of Word as a long term game with tons of replay value; over time, type the entire Bible or just one book or just the famous verses and then go back to improve your score.

  • Record your most efficient performance for each verse-set.
Navigating the menus, if you have played the level previously, your best performance will be displayed; efficiency score increases with both higher-WPM and fewer-mistakes.

  • Featuring instrumental hip hop by Fidget !!
Includes an ample sampling of super talented audio genius, Fidget! Choose his playlist on the options menu; the default gameplay audio is a satisfying Chopin piano playlist.

  • Word makes use of the World English Bible (WEBP)
The World English Bible is a Public Domain Modern English translation of the Holy Bible.
